releases.name: GameHub Brasil v2.0
releases.body:
# 🎮 GameHub Brasil v2.0 🇧🇷

## 🌟 Destaques desta Versão O GameHub Brasil v2.0 chega para revolucionar como você gerencia seus jogos e drivers. Focamos totalmente na flexibilidade e compatibilidade, permitindo que você importe seus próprios arquivos, gerencie perfis de controle com facilidade e leve a experiência de jogos para dispositivos de qualquer gama de desempenho. --- 🚀 Novidades e Recursos Implementados --- ## 📥AdrenoHub Drivers (Adrenotools). ✅ Integração Adrenotools: Sistema robusto para gerenciamento de drivers Vulkan. 📂 Importação Flexível: Suporte para importação de drivers Turnip no formato .zip. 💾 Fontes Variadas: Carregue drivers de fontes externas ou diretamente do armazenamento local do seu dispositivo. ## 📂 Contents Hub Centralize seus conteúdos de forma prática e rápida. 🎮 Formato .wcp: Importação completa de Contents no formato proprietário. 🔄 Compatibilidade Híbrida: Suporte a arquivos externos e locais. ⚠️ Nota Técnica: O importador de conteúdo está funcional, porém, a importação do **Wine** ainda enfrenta limitações devido a diferenças de arquitetura, estando em aperfeiçoamento. ## 🕹️ Personalização de Controle Jogue do seu jeito, sem precisar configurar tudo do zero. 📥 Importação de Perfis: Adicione perfis de controle personalizados para jogos específicos. 🌐 Fontes Externas: Compatibilidade com perfis baixados da comunidade. 🎯 Praticidade: Aplicação rápida para agilizar o setup dos seus jogos favoritos. ## 💾 Suporte a Armazenamento Externo (OTG) Mais espaço e liberdade para sua biblioteca de jogos. 🔌 Reconhecimento OTG: O app agora detecta e gerencia perfeitamente pen drives e HDs externos conectados via OTG. 📂 Jogar Externo: Instale e rode seus jogos diretamente do armazenamento removível. ## ⚡ LowSpecsExperienceV13 Leve jogos pesados para hardwares mais modestos. 📉 Otimização Gráfica: Programa dedicado a reduzir e otimizar jogos. 🎮 Foco em Jogabilidade: Prioriza FPS e estabilidade em detrimento de efeitos pesados. 📱 Inclusão Total: Já incluído nativamente nesta versão em Componentes. ## ✅ Wrappers e Vortek A ponte entre o sistema Android e seus jogos. 🛠️ Gerenciamento Avançado: Inclusão do sistema de Wrappers e Vortek, similar ao encontrado no Winlator. 🔁 Seleção de Drivers: Permite escolher a camada de compatibilidade ideal para cada título. ## 🔧 Melhorias Técnicas Esta versão focou na arquitetura interna do aplicativo para suportar as novas funções de importação: 🔨 Refatoração do Gerenciador de Arquivos: Melhorias na leitura de caminhos locais e externos. 🛡️ Estabilidade em Importações: Tratamento de erros aprimorado ao ler arquivos .zip e .wcp ## 📥 Informações de Download Nome do Arquivo: GameHub-Brasil-v2.0.apk Requisitos Mínimos: Android 8.0 (Oreo) ou superior 4GB de RAM (Recomendado 6GB+ para uso do LowSpecsExperience) 3GB de espaço livre (Para instalação e drivers) GPU com suporte a Vulkan 1.1+ Dispositivo com suporte a OTG (Opcional, para armazenamento externo) ## 🙏 Agradecimentos Essa versão é um grande passo em direção à personalização. Agradecemos a todos os testadores que validaram as novas funções e algumas que foram importadas do Winlator Ludashi [StevenMXZ](https://github.com/StevenMXZ/Winlator-Ludashi) E para você ficar por dentro do houve no app, segue o vídeo do nosso parceiro [BrunoAndroid](https://www.youtube.com/@BrunoAndroid) explicando sobre o funcionamento do app:

## 📞 Suporte e Feedback Encontrou algum bug na importação de drivers ou no Contents Hub? 🐛 Reporte problemas na aba [Issues](../../issues) 💡 Compartilhe seus perfis de controle e wrappers na comunidade 💡 Compartilhe ideias em [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@winlatorbrasil) ⭐ Se gostou da atualização, deixe uma estrela no repositório! --- ## 📥 Sobre os pacotes que você deve baixar | Posição (prioridade) | Nome / Categoria | Package name | Motivo de uso (performance / detecção) | |---------------------|--------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| | 1 | Futuremark | com.futuremark.dmandroid.application | Benchmark GPU moderno (Wild Life / Solar Bay), referência para modo gamer em vários aparelhos atuais, excelente para GPUs Mali/Adreno. | | 2 | GFXBench | com.gfxbench.glbenchmark | Benchmark gráfico com cenários antigos e atuais (T-Rex, Manhattan, etc.), excelente para GPUs Mali/Adreno. | | 3 | AnTuTu | com.antutu.ABenchMark | Benchmark geral muito popular (CPU + GPU + RAM + UX), frequentemente usado para liberar modo turbo em ROMs chinesas. | | 4 | Ludashi | com.ludashi.benchmark | Benchmark chinês focado em score geral e otimização, conhecido por acionar perfis especiais em alguns devices e ROMs custom. | | 5 | Redmagic | com.riotgames.league.wildrift | Usado por fabricantes para ativar modos de alta performance e alta taxa de quadros. | | 6 | MiHoYo | com.mihoyo.yuanshen | Usado como “teste real” de SoC e gatilho de perfil gamer. | | 7 | PUBG | com.tencent.ig | Tradicionalmente incluído em listas de otimização para reduzir lag e melhorar estabilidade de FPS. | | 8 | GameHub Brasil | com.gamehub.brasil | App genérico/launcher para cenário “normal”, útil para manter um perfil padrão sem overclock ou boost ativado. | ---
**Desenvolvido com ❤️ para a comunidade gaming brasileira** *Jogue mais, jogue melhor!* **V2.0: Mais liberdade, mais jogos!**

releases.name: GameHub Brasil v1.0
releases.body:
# 🎮 GameHub Brasil v1.0 🇧🇷

--- ## 🌟 Destaques desta Versão Esta versão representa um marco significativo em otimização e estabilidade, trazendo melhorias substanciais de performance para todos os chipsets suportados, além de uma experiência visual completamente renovada e novos componentes de emulação de última geração. --- ## 📦 Novos Componentes e Drivers ### **Box64** - Camada de Tradução x86_64 Atualizações importantes para melhor compatibilidade e performance: - ✨ **Box64 0.3.8** - Versão estável com correções críticas - 🚀 **Box64 0.3.9-d730610** - Build de desenvolvimento com otimizações avançadas - ⚡ **WowBox64 0.3.9-d730610** - Variante otimizada para gaming ### **DXVK** - Camada de Tradução DirectX para Vulkan Nova série com GPLAsync e Link-Lazy para máxima performance: - 🎯 **DXVK-GPLAsync-LL 2.6.3-1** - Base estável com async pipeline - 🔧 **DXVK-GPLAsync-LL 2.6.4-1** - Correções e melhorias incrementais - 💎 **DXVK-GPLAsync-LL 2.7.1-1** - Versão mais recente com otimizações de shader ### **FEX-Emu** - Emulador x86/x86_64 - 🆕 **FEXCore-2510** - Última geração do núcleo de emulação com melhorias significativas de velocidade ### **Turnip** - Driver Vulkan Mesa para Adreno Suporte completo ao Mesa 26.0.0: - 🔥 **Turnip v26.0.0 R1 Autotuner** - Ajuste automático de performance baseado em GPU - ⚙️ **Turnip v26.0.0 R1** - Versão padrão otimizada --- ## ⚡ Otimizações de Performance por Chipset Esta versão inclui ajustes específicos para extrair o máximo desempenho de cada arquitetura: ### 🔥 **Snapdragon (Qualcomm)** - Otimizações para GPUs Adreno - Perfis customizados para séries 6xx, 7xx e 8xx - Melhor aproveitamento de cache L2/L3 ### 🚀 **Dimensity / Helio (MediaTek)** - Ajustes para arquitetura ARM Mali - Balanceamento de carga entre clusters CPU - Otimização de thermal throttling ### 💫 **Exynos (Samsung)** - Perfis específicos para Mali e Xclipse - Gerenciamento inteligente de frequências - Compatibilidade aprimorada com drivers --- ## 🎨 Renovação Visual Completa ### **Interface Modernizada** - 🖼️ **Novo Wallpaper Principal** - Design moderno e imersivo - 🎬 **Intro Redesenhada** - Animação de inicialização atualizada - 🎨 **Paleta de Cores Renovada** - Esquema cromático mais harmônico e profissional - 🌈 **Wallpapers Adicionais** - Nova coleção de papéis de parede temáticos ### **Seção "Sobre" Aprimorada** - 📝 HTML customizado em "Informações Pessoais" - 💼 Layout mais profissional e organizado - ℹ️ Informações atualizadas e detalhadas --- ## 🌐 Novos Recursos ### **Feed de Notícias & Jogos Grátis** - 📰 Fique atualizado com as últimas notícias do mundo dos games - 🎁 Descubra jogos gratuitos disponíveis - 🔔 Sistema de notificações para novos conteúdos ### **Tradução PT-BR Automática** - 🇧🇷 Interface completamente em Português do Brasil - 🔤 Tradução inteligente de conteúdos dinâmicos --- ## 🔧 Melhorias Técnicas e Correções ### **Otimização de Conectividade** - ❌ **Removida integração direta com GitHub** - Solução definitiva para erro "429: Too Many Requests" - Eliminação de problemas de carregamento do menu ### **Estabilidade Geral** - 🛡️ Correções de bugs críticos - ⚙️ Gerenciamento de recursos otimizado --- ## 📥 Informações de Download **Nome do Arquivo:** `GameHub-Brasil-v1.0.apk` **Requisitos Mínimos:** - Android 8.0 (Oreo) ou superior - 2GB de RAM (4GB recomendado) - 500MB de espaço livre - GPU com suporte a Vulkan 1.1+ --- ## 🙏 Agradecimentos Agradecemos a toda comunidade GameHub Brasil pelo feedback contínuo e suporte. Esta versão é resultado direto das sugestões e relatórios de vocês! E ao GameHub Lite 🤜🤛. --- ## 📞 Suporte e Feedback Encontrou algum problema ou tem sugestões? - 🐛 Reporte bugs na aba [Issues](../../issues) - 💡 Compartilhe ideias em [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@winlatorbrasil) - ⭐ Se gostou, deixe uma estrela no repositório! ---
**Desenvolvido com ❤️ para a comunidade gaming brasileira** *Jogue mais, jogue melhor!*

releases.name: Winlator 11 beta v3.1 mod Ajay Final
releases.body:
### Changelog

* **Drive path Update:** Changed drive E path to drive K for installed_components , You can copy box64,  turnip etc to drive K.
* **Automated Setup:** Implemented automatic configuration for SymLink folders and required dependencies.
* **Environment Variables:** Added new environment variables for improved configuration.
* **Start Menu:** Added an automatic update check feature to the Start Menu.
* **Box64rc:** Updated `box64rc` specifically for trainer compatibility.

---

### Final Update
* **SymLink Fix:** Resolved an issue causing the SymLink process to repeat unnecessarily.
* **Autorun.exe:** The application now runs without a console window.
* **Bug Fixes:** General stability improvements and minor bug resolutions.

### How to run ajau3 Script for downloading latest dxvk and turnip etc ?
Just install Ajay Prefix Pro then double click on it.
Requirements : Drive K should be mounted of this path -  `/data/data/com.winlator/files`

### How to run the trainer with game performance presets?
Simply include the word **"trainer"** in the filename of your game trainer or Cheat Engine application.

### Winlator.Ajay.Components.Downloader.ajau3 -
this program can be run after installing Ajay Prefix Pro. It can download latest installable components (box64 , turnip , wined3d , dxvk , vkd3d etc).

---
*Note: This release focuses exclusively on streamlining and automating the setup process. Do not close the container if any of the following processes are active in Task Manager: autorun.exe, cmd.exe, wget.exe, xcopy.exe, or 7z.exe.*

releases.name: Winlator 9 Proot Ajay v3

### Changelog -

- Updated Installable Components path (Box64, Turnip, etc.)
- Bugs fixed

#### Note  -
This is a clone app. It can be installed alongside the official latest Winlator.

### What's special about Winlator PRoot build -
It uses the latest Wine from Kron4ek, but without the XInput patch.This is the final PRoot-based build.It can be useful for running older PC games.The latest Box64 version is not included in this build.

### Note about Upcoming Winlator Updates  -
If a major improvement is released in the official Winlator or if I need to create a backup. Currently, there is no need to modify the latest official Winlator as it is already well-optimized — simply install Ajay Prefix Pro.

### Changelog

* `winlator_bionic` -> `upstream` : `winlator_bionic_devbranch`
* changed wfm to a version without icons for faster loading, thanks to de0ver for this.
* re-added dxvk scale and opacity
* updated adrenotools
* added virtual gamepad lightup.
* Merge branch 'winlator_bionic' into 'winlator_bionic_dev5'
* `DXVKConfigDialog`: refractor setEnvVars
* `WineD3DConfigDialog`: fix typo
* Add a `WineD3DConfigDialog` to configure wined3d
* `ContainerDetailFragment`: remove all wined3d related registry keys
* move ddrawrapper config into `DXVKConfigDialog`
* vulkan: slight refactoring

releases.name: dev7
releases.body:
IMPORTANT NOTICE
preinstalled FEXCore 2505 might fail to load on some devices use the 2508.1 wcp instead till I hotfix it tommrow.


### Release Notes

* Merged branch 'winlator_bionic' from pipetto-crypto into 'winlator_bionic_dev5'.
* Refactored 'ContainerDetailFragment' to partially fix setupDXWrapper logic.
* Updated v762 and v805 to v819.
* Added required variables to 'GuestProgramLauncherComponent' to disable the proton mediaconverter plugin.
* 'ContainerDetailFragment': Recreated config if wrapper version is empty.
* Defaulted to 'turnip25.1.0' on supported devices.
* 'Vulkan': Minor refactoring.
* 'GraphicsDriverConfigDialog': Blacklisted unsupported drivers.
* 'DXVKConfigDialog': Blacklisted 'arm64ec dxvk' on non 'arm64ec' containers.
* Removed non-necessary assets.
* 'GLRenderer': Added 'force fullscreen' option.
* Fixed background selection in container settings.
* 'StorageInfoDialog': Refactored.
* Removed unused 'RestoreActivity' class.
* Removed all code related to the 'SaveManager'.
* Removed the option to export containers.
* Removed the option to import containers.
* 'SettingsFragment': Removed backup and restore data options.
* Assets: Fixed wrong 'aarch64 dlls'.
* Removed all references to 'Winlator 7.1.2' legacy input mode.
* 'VKD3DVersionItem': Does not force version on assets files.
* Removed 'TerminalActivity' and all related code.
* 'Vulkan': Minor refactoring.
* Deleted saves, the magnifier, and screen effects.
* Changed shortcut text color to white.
* Defaulted background key press to shortcut list like the start page.
* Brought back container icons.

releases.name: star Bionic V1.0 - Stable Release
releases.body: **After a long wait, the Bionic version of star is finally released. We have so many huge changes here in this version, we promise.** # Changelog - Implemented a new FPS Counter - You can now easily manager your FPS Counter in the container menu. You can adjust It however you like, adding CPU Temperaturs, GPU Load or just having a simple FPS Counter. - Graphics Engine implemented (thanks to @StevenMXZ) - You can now use a new Super Resolution setting, a DLS Color Boost setting and most importantly, the HDR, like the one used in GameHub directly in the container! - Reimplemented the Save Manager from winlator cmod @coffincolors - You can now easily manager your save datas without even entering the container, by simply going in the menu and going in the saves page. - Reimplemented the export and import container feature. - Self explainatory. - Revamped the layout of the shortcut menu, inspired from winlator bionic by @de0ver - With the addition of sort, switch-able layout into grid or list and ability to import shortcut from internal storage, the shortcut menu are now looks fresh and very interesting - Implemented the custom icon in the shortcut item settings and controller elements settings - You can now feel free to import any of the pictures from your device storage into the shortcut icon or controller elements icon - Implemented the Active Windows from Winlator Official @brunodev85 - You can use this feature to check the active windows or bring the windows into front by tapping on the windows inside the dialog - Improved the Wine Start Menu - Added a few more apps that are imported from winlator official @brunodev85 and imported the star prefix start menu from the previous release of star plus the addition of web browser in online installable components - Implemented a new controller implementation (Thanks to @Vivsi1) - You can now play games with a new controller support like the One in Cmod 13, but better - Merged some changes made by @Pipetto-crypto - Merged for updating the wrapper, zink, d8vk files, many other small changes in XServerDisplayActivity and add the Proton option in the contents menu - Changed the download able contents URL to @Xnick417x for more bionic nightlies (thanks to him) - Added latest turnip 26.1.0 (but we have no idea if it works in Adreno 8xx series) but so far it's works very well in Adreno 6xx and 7xx series # Version Information - Original: Regular package name, `com.winlator.star` - Ludashi: For locking processor frequencies at maximum especially on Xiaomi devices, `com.ludashi.benchmark` - Antutu: It's same functionality as ludashi but it's an alternative, in order if you have installed the bionic apk with existing ludashi package name, `com.antutu.ABenchMark`

releases.name: star 11-2 | Stable Release
releases.body: **Small update of star emulator v11 are now released! Check them out what we have changed in this release!** # Changelog - Added USB storage permission like winlator bionic - Fixed and restored the online components in the start menu - Improved the default environment variables - Added several new environment variables for experimental in the glibc, ported from winlator bionic - Small fixes

releases.name: star 11-1 | Stable Release
releases.body: **After a long time, star 11-1 is released! We dropped some huge updates! Check them out below!** # Changelog - Ported all of the features from 10.1 v3 afei: - Contents Tab (dxvk,box64 etc.) - Hostei Settings, aka star Settings (terminal, backup, rootfs manager etc.) - Foreground notification services - Added many features in the XServer menu (inside the container) (move cursor to touchpoint, toggle orientation and pause/resume) - Added DXVK d3d9 boost game fps for mali devices in the start menu (thanks to Isygold) - Added new options for TU_DEBUG env (forcecb and nocb) from Winlator Bionic - Some improvements have been made in the environment variables settings - Recompiled default box64 and replaced it with a self compiled one. - Modified the default wallpapers to match star - Updated FPS counter to match star ----------- Some contents, as DXVK, wont install properly because they arent put in the repository. We will fix it soon.

releases.name: Steamlator 1.5.2
releases.body:
🏗 Based on Winlator Just Bionic 1.5.2


🚀 Key Changes

Steam is built into the APK – when you launch the container, the Steam launcher opens automatically.
    
![photo_5792158196801063468_y](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/37e5ab07-da9e-4051-b1ba-339b44e0e50e)

Uses special launch arguments for maximum compatibility.

Verified: Steam runs on devices with Helio G99 and Snapdragon 665
(devices with more powerful processors will work as well).
    
Steamlator includes all the features of Winlator Just Bionic 1.5.2, including:

 Support for importing .wcp files

All functionality of the original Winlator Just Bionic

🖥 Windows Application Support

Steamlator uses Proton + Box64 to run Windows applications.

You can also install Wine via:
 Contents → select version 9.2 or 9.16.

🎮 DXVK Updates

Added DXVK 2.6.1 and Glansync

Added DXVK 2.7

Older DXVK versions are still available

New FPS limit options added: 25 FPS and 35 FPS

🌍 Localization

The Steamlator interface now includes:

English language 

Russian language 

Ukrainian language

releases.name: Winlator~Honkon v11
releases.body:
### VERSION WINLATOR V11 MOD

***Esta versión sigue siendo básica pero trae algunas mejoras en general y otras más específicas para dispositivo mediatek,gpu mali y gpu xclipse.***

### _registro_ _de_ _cambios_

•Todo los cambios de la versión oficial de Bruno.
•Se agregó el menu de contenido de la versión afeimod(creditos y agradecimiento).
•Traduje gran parte de la interfaz a español además de cambiar el logo y tema.
•Se cambió el directorio de donde se descarga el contenido,esto para agregar DXVK parcheado como stripped o sarek para mayor compatibilidad con vulkan 1.1 o 1.2 con pocas extenciones disponibles, también se agregaron varios wined3d para descargar.
•Se agregaron varías variables en la configuración de box64 para mayor rendimiento y compatibilidad.
•Se agregaron parches para el rendimiento y compatibilidad.
•se agregaron complemento necesario para distintos títulos funcionen correctamente.
•se agregaron distintas variables para rendimiento, compatibilidad y estabilidad.

releases.name: Winlator~honkon v10.1
releases.body: ### vortek+DXVK ya funciona en gpu mali Esta versión sigue siendo básica pero trae algunas mejoras en general y otras más específicas para dispositivo mediatek,gpu mali y xclipse,más adelante subiré una versión completa :) AVISO:vortek no funciona en todo los dispositivos con mediatek,esto debido a varios factores lo cuales son driver, versión de vulkan ,extenciones etc... Bruno trabajo arduamente para mejorar la compatibilidad y rendimiento de winlator en dispositivos con gpu mali y xclipse. ### Registro de cambios: 1- se uso la versión de afie mod como inspiración,créditos y agradecimiento.. Aquí la versión por si la quieren probar [mod afei](https://github.com/afeimod/winlator-mod/releases/tag/10.0-Amod5fix) 1.1• se elimino la opción de comandos y traduje la opción para agregar contenido... Tenga en cuenta que algunas cajas y controladores deben instalarse con wine9.16.whp antes de poder usarse,está opción solo es para pruebas, por favor apoya al autor original. 2•Se cambió el directorio de donde se descarga el contenido,esto para agregar DXVK parcheado como stripped o sarek para mayor compatibilidad con vulkan 1.1 o 1.2 con pocas extenciones disponibles, también se agregaron varios wined3d para descargar. 3•Se agregaron parches para el rendimiento y compatibilidad. 4•se agregaron complemento necesario para distintos títulos funcionen correctamente. 5•se agregaron distintas variables para rendimiento, compatibilidad y estabilidad.

• **se reemplazo la carpeta lib para mayor rendimiento,menor tiempo de carga y compatibilidad con dispositivos que no admiten 32bit,puede no funcionar.**
• **se agregó Wined3d en las configuraciones del container, puede no funcionar.**
• **se agregó box86,box64,Wined3d,mesa VirGL y algunos complementos.**
• **algunas correcciones y mejoras en el rendimiento.**

releases.name: Bannerhub v2.8.3
releases.body: > [!WARNING] > **Only install STABLE releases.** Do NOT install pre-releases or CI build artifacts directly. > Pre-releases may be broken, incomplete, or cause data loss. Stable releases are the only versions tested end-to-end with all 9 APK variants. --- ## New since v2.8.2 (last stable) - **Extra Detail HUD** — a third HUD overlay that replaces the normal Winlator HUD when both the *Winlator HUD Style* toggle and the new *Extra Detailed* checkbox are enabled - Horizontal layout: FPS (spanning both rows with graph), CPU%, GPU%, RAM, SWAP, CPU temp, GPU temp, BAT temp — separated by vertical dividers - Vertical layout: same metrics, one per row - Opacity slider controls both normal and detailed HUD transparency - At <10% opacity: centered text shadow/halo for readability; at 10–29%: slightly larger halo; at ≥30%: no shadow - *Extra Detailed* checkbox is grayed out and disabled whenever the Winlator HUD is off - The Extra Detail HUD is a continuation and extension of the **Winlator HUD by Stevenmxz**. The additional metrics and layout were inspired by the performance HUD built into my personal device — no credit is claimed from any external project. - **Note:** Not all data collected and displayed will always be correct. Each device detects and reads data differently. Values are read directly from sysfs/proc and may vary in accuracy depending on device, kernel, and thermal zone mapping. > [!NOTE] > The large full-screen performance overlay seen on the **AYANEO Pocket FIT** (AYANEO Konk) is a device-specific OEM feature built into that hardware. It is **not** what was added to BannerHub. The Extra Detail HUD added here is a compact in-game overlay extension of the existing Winlator HUD. --- ## Full Feature Set - **HUD overlays** — Normal Winlator HUD (frame rate graph, credit: Stevenmxz), Extra Detailed HUD (expanded metrics: CPU%/GPU%/RAM/SWAP/CPU-temp/GPU-temp/BAT-temp), opacity slider, orientation toggle - **GOG integration** — OAuth2 login, full library sync, card UI with ✓ Installed checkmark, Gen 1+Gen 2 game download, uninstall - **Epic Games integration** — OAuth2 login via WebView, full library sync, chunked download (6-parallel), install size display, uninstall - **Amazon Games integration** — PKCE OAuth2 login, library sync (GetEntitlements), protobuf manifest (XZ/LZMA), 6-parallel download, SHA-256 verify, FuelPump launch, SDK DLLs, uninstall - **Component Manager** — backup, WCP/ZIP inject, "Add New Component" true injection, remove - **Component Downloader** — 3-level nav: repo → category (DXVK/VKD3D/Box64/FEXCore/GPU Driver) → filtered asset list → download+inject; supports GitHub Releases API + flat pack.json repos (Arihany WCPHub) - **Performance sidebar** — Sustained Performance toggle, Max Adreno Clocks toggle - **Controller D-pad navigation** — gold focus highlights on all store cards (GOG/Epic/Amazon) in grid, poster, and list view; A-button confirm - **"My Games" tab label** — corrected from "My" - **BCI launcher button** — top-right toolbar shortcut - **RTS touch controls** — credit @Nightwalker743 - **Offline Steam login skip** — bypasses Steam auth gate for offline use - **Multiple APK variants** — 9 variants including Normal (`banner.hub`), Normal(GHL) (`gamehub.lite`), CrossFire, and more --- ## Installation Choose the APK matching your device architecture: | APK filename | Architecture | |---|---| | `BannerHub-Normal-arm64-v8a.apk` | Most Android phones/tablets (64-bit ARM) | | `BannerHub-Normal-x86_64.apk` | x86_64 devices / emulators | - **Coexist APK**: variants with different package names (e.g. `gamehub.lite`) can be installed alongside existing GameHub without conflict. - All APKs are signed with the standard AOSP test key.

releases.name: Bannerhub v2.8.2
releases.body: > ⚠️ **Install stable releases only.** Do NOT install pre-releases or CI artifacts — pre-releases may be unstable, incomplete, or fail to build correctly. Always use the latest stable release for daily use. --- ## New since v2.8.1 (last stable) - **Controller/gamepad focus navigation** — navigate GOG, Epic, and Amazon stores with a D-pad or analog stick; focused card/tile shows a gold border + background tint so you always know where you are - List view: full-width cards — gold 3dp stroke on focus - Grid/Poster view: tile wrapper foreground border (works correctly with `clipToOutline`) - Header buttons (back ←, view toggle, refresh ↺): gold 2dp border on focus - Pressing A selects/expands in all three view modes - **Store UI polish** — developer · genre subtitle in collapsed list cards; empty state messages; sync status color-coded (red=error, green=success); progress bar tinted to store accent color - **Epic install size fix** — discards stale cached install sizes > 1 TB (was showing astronomical values like "7516192768.00 GB") - **Download performance** — 8 parallel threads for GOG/Epic/Amazon; GOG Gen1/Gen2 retry+resume; Epic chunk streaming; 128KB buffers throughout - **Debug files** — `bh_epic_debug.txt` / `bh_amazon_debug.txt` written on download failures for easier diagnosis --- ## Full Feature Set ### Game Stores - **GOG** — OAuth2 login, full library sync, Gen 1 + Gen 2 download, install/uninstall, launch, ✓ installed checkmark, 3 view modes (list/grid/poster), search, controller navigation - **Epic Games** — OAuth2 login, library sync, chunked manifest download, install/uninstall, launch, 3 view modes, search, controller navigation - **Amazon Games** — PKCE OAuth login, GetEntitlements library sync, manifest.proto (XZ/LZMA) download, install/uninstall, launch, FuelSDK + AmazonGamesSDK DLLs, 3 view modes, search, controller navigation ### BannerHub Extras - **Wine Task Manager** — in-game sidebar tab (Applications, Processes, Launch tabs); Kill button; 3s auto-refresh; WINEPREFIX file browser with exe/msi/bat launch - **Component Manager** — backup, WCP/ZIP inject, "Add New Component" true injection, Remove; online repo browser (GitHub Releases + Arihany WCPHub pack.json); 3-level nav (repo → category → asset) - **Performance sidebar** — Sustained Performance mode, Max Adreno Clocks toggles - **RTS touch controls** — credit @Nightwalker743 - **My Games → "My Games"** tab label fix - **Offline Steam login skip** ### Installation Choose the APK matching your device or use-case: | APK | Package | Use when | |-----|---------|----------| | Normal | `banner.hub` | Fresh install alongside GameHub | | Normal(GHL) | `gamehub.lite` | Replacing BH-Lite | | PuBG | `com.tencent.ig` | Replacing standard GameHub | | AnTuTu / alt-AnTuTu | benchmark packages | Benchmark slot installs | | PuBG-CrossFire | `com.tencent.tmgp.cf` | CrossFire slot | | Ludashi | `com.ludashi.aibench` | Ludashi slot | | Genshin | `com.mihoyo.genshinimpact` | Genshin slot | | Original | `com.xiaoji.egggame` | Original slot | All variants coexist — install multiple to run BannerHub in different package slots simultaneously.

releases.name: Bannerhub v2.8.1
releases.body: > ⚠️ **Install stable releases only.** Do not install pre-releases or CI artifacts — they may be unstable or incomplete. ## New since v2.8.0 - **Wine Task Manager — Launch tab:** In-game sidebar now has a third "Launch" tab. Opens at your Wine prefix's drive list (`c:`, `d:`, `z:`), lets you browse folders and tap any `.exe`, `.msi`, `.bat`, or `.cmd` to launch it inside the running Wine session. ## Full Feature Set - GOG Games, Amazon Games, Epic Games Store library tabs (OAuth2 login, library sync, download, launch) - Component Manager (backup, inject WCP/ZIP, remove, Add New Component) - In-app component downloader (GitHub Releases API + pack.json sources) - Wine Task Manager sidebar (Applications, Processes, Launch tabs; Kill button; Container Info panel) - Winlator HUD overlay (FPS, RAM, CPU; draggable, resizable, opacity slider) - Performance sidebar toggles (Sustained Performance Mode, Max Adreno Clocks — root required) - RTS touch controls (tap, drag, long-press, double-tap, two-finger pan, pinch-zoom) - VRAM limit unlock (6/8/12/16 GB options) - Per-game CPU core affinity selector - PC game settings offline mode - Offline Steam launch - Component descriptions in game settings picker - Japanese locale - "My Games" tab label, BCI launcher button, UI tweaks ## Installation Download the APK matching your device architecture: - `arm64-v8a` — most modern Android devices - `x86_64` — x86 emulators The `(GHL)` variant uses `gamehub.lite` package and can be installed alongside the normal variant.

releases.name: Bannerhub v2.8.0
releases.body:
> ⚠️ **Only install stable releases. Do NOT install pre-releases or CI artifacts.** Pre-releases may be incomplete, unstable, or contain untested changes. Stable releases have been fully tested on real hardware.

## New since v2.7.6 (last stable)

- **Epic Games Store tab** — full integration: OAuth2 login, library sync with title/developer/art/description, 6-parallel chunk downloads, SHA-1 integrity verify, file assembly, launch via EditImportedGameInfoDialog
- **Japanese translations** — complete 3,468-string Japanese locale (Crowdin source, contributed by reindex-ot); app displays in Japanese when system language is set to Japanese
- **Download speed + filename** — Epic, Amazon, and GOG all show the current filename and MB/s speed during download
- **Epic install size fix** — correctly shows uncompressed install size instead of compressed CDN chunk size
- **Uninstall checkmark fix** — both the collapsed header ✓ and expanded section ✓ disappear immediately on uninstall in Epic, Amazon, and GOG
- **Amazon download progress fix** — filename now displays correctly during download
- **Amazon OTP / 2FA login fix** — login no longer hangs after entering a one-time password or security code

## Full Feature Set

- **Steam** — My Games tab, library, launch (full GameHub native)
- **GOG Games tab** — OAuth2 login, library sync with cover art, Gen2/Gen1/installer download, install progress with speed + filename, launch, uninstall, Copy to Downloads
- **Amazon Games tab** — PKCE OAuth2 login (OTP/2FA supported), library sync, manifest.proto download (XZ/LZMA, 6-parallel), SHA-256 verify, launch via fuel.json, SDK DLLs, update checker
- **Epic Games Store tab** — OAuth2 login, library sync, chunked manifest download (6-parallel), SHA-1 verify, file assembly, launch
- **Download speed + filename** — all three stores show current filename and MB/s during download
- **Components Manager** — backup, inject WCP/ZIP, Remove, Add New Component
- **Download from Online Repos** — 3-level navigator: repo → category → asset → download + inject
- **Performance sidebar** — Sustained Performance mode, Max Adreno Clocks toggles
- **RTS touch controls** — credit @Nightwalker743
- **Winlator HUD overlay** — FPS/frame time/resolution, opacity slider, position/orientation persistence
- **Japanese locale** — complete 3,468-string translation (Crowdin, contributed by reindex-ot)
- **"My Games" tab label** fix
- **BCI launcher button** — top-right toolbar shortcut to BannersComponentInjector

## Credits

- **GOG, Amazon Games, and Epic Games Store integrations** — [The GameNative Team](https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative). The API pipelines, authentication flows, download architectures, and library sync for all three stores in BannerHub are based on their research and implementation.
- **Japanese translations** — [reindex-ot](https://github.com/reindex-ot) (via Crowdin)
- **RTS Touch Controls** — [@Nightwalker743](https://github.com/Nightwalker743)
- **GameHub ReVanced patches** — [@playday3008](https://github.com/playday3008/gamehub-patches)

## Installation

Install the APK matching your use case:
- **Normal (`banner.hub`)** — standard install, coexists with GameHub
- **Normal(GHL) (`gamehub.lite`)** — coexists with BannerHub Lite
- Other variants (PuBG, Genshin, AnTuTu, etc.) — replace those specific apps

All APKs signed with AOSP testkey.

releases.name: Bannerhub v2.7.6
releases.body: > ⚠️ **Only install stable releases. Do NOT install pre-releases or raw workflow artifacts.** Pre-releases are unfinished testing builds — they may be unstable, crash, or contain broken features. Always use the latest stable release for normal use. --- ## New since v2.7.5 (last stable) ### Amazon Games Integration - **Amazon Games** side menu entry — full library with list/grid/poster views - **PKCE OAuth login** via Amazon's authorization server (no password stored) - **Library sync** — fetches all owned games via GetEntitlements API (paginated) - **Install confirm dialog** — shows game size (fetched from manifest) + available storage - **Download pipeline** — manifest.proto (XZ/LZMA), 6-parallel chunks, SHA-256 verification, resume support - **Progress bar** with percentage + current filename during download, Cancel button - **Exe picker** — shown post-install when multiple executables found; scoring heuristic auto-selects best candidate for single-exe games - **Launch** — adds game to My Games via LandscapeLauncherMainActivity - **Update checker** — compares installed versionId against live Amazon API; shows orange "Update Available" badge - **SDK DLLs** — auto-downloads FuelSDK_x64.dll + AmazonGamesSDK DLLs into Wine prefix ProgramData before launch - **Token refresh** — lazy re-auth when token is within 5 min of expiry - **Uninstall + Set .exe** from detail dialog - **Credits** — Amazon integration based on research by [The GameNative Team](https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative) --- ## Full Feature Set ### Game Libraries - **Steam** — My Games tab with Steam library sync and launch - **GOG Games** — full library, OAuth2 login, download, install, launch, uninstall *(credit: The GameNative Team)* - **Amazon Games** — full library, PKCE login, download, install, launch, uninstall *(credit: The GameNative Team)* ### Component Manager - Install, remove, and inject Wine components (DXVK, VKD3D, Box64, GPU drivers) - Download from online repos (GitHub Releases API + pack.json sources) - Backup and restore components - Add/inject custom WCP and ZIP files ### Performance & Settings - Sustained Performance mode toggle - Max Adreno Clocks toggle - Winlator HUD overlay with opacity slider, text outline tiers, position and orientation persistence - Grant Root Access button in settings ### UI - "My Games" tab label (instead of "My") - BCI launcher button in top-right toolbar - RTS touch controls *(credit: @Nightwalker743)* - Per-variant app labels (BannerHub, BannerHub PuBG, BannerHub AnTuTu, etc.) - Offline Steam login skip --- ## Installation **Choose your APK by architecture:** - `BannerHub-v2.7.6-Normal.apk` — replaces standard GameHub (`banner.hub`) - `BannerHub-v2.7.6-Normal(GHL).apk` — coexists alongside GameHub Lite (`gamehub.lite`) - Other variants (PuBG, AnTuTu, Genshin, etc.) replace their respective apps **To coexist with the original GameHub:** install the `Normal(GHL)` variant — it uses package ID `gamehub.lite` and can be installed alongside the original app.

releases.name: Bannerhub v2.7.5
releases.body:
> ⚠️ **IMPORTANT: Only install stable releases. Do NOT install pre-releases or CI artifacts.**
> Pre-releases are untested intermediate builds. Only stable releases (like this one) are verified working APKs safe to install on your device.

---

## New since v2.7.3 (last stable)

### Winlator-style HUD Overlay
- **Live HUD overlay** injected into the game window showing: API | TIME | GPU% | CPU% | RAM% | BAT | TMP | FPS + graph
- **Tap to toggle** between compact horizontal bar and vertical column layout
- **Drag to reposition** anywhere on screen — position persists across sessions
- **Orientation persists** — HUD remembers horizontal/vertical mode across sidebar opens
- **Time display** shown after API value in both horizontal and vertical modes

### Performance Sidebar (Settings → Performance)
- **HUD Opacity slider** (0–100%, default 80%) — controls background transparency only; text always stays fully opaque
- **"Extra Detailed (coming soon)"** checkbox — grayed out, reserved for a future per-core + GPU detail view
- **Opacity auto-restores** on every game launch

### HUD Readability at Low Opacity
- **≥ 30%** — clean text, no effect
- **10–29%** — black shadow halo (blurred glow) around text
- **< 10%** — solid black stroke outline + shadow halo combined for maximum readability

---

## Full Feature Set

- **"My Games" tab** relabeled to "My Games"
- **BCI launcher button** (top-right toolbar) — quick launch to BannersComponentInjector
- **Components side menu** — backup, inject WCP/ZIP, add new component, remove component
- **In-app component downloader** — browse GitHub Releases repos + WCPHub by category (DXVK, VKD3D, Box64, FEXCore, GPU Driver); download and auto-inject
- **GOG integration** — OAuth2 login, library sync, game cards with ✓ Installed checkmark, Gen 1 + Gen 2 download, exe picker, uninstall
- **Epic Games integration** — OAuth2 login, library sync, chunked manifest download, exe picker, install confirmation, cancel download, Set .exe button
- **RTS touch controls** — gesture-based touch overlay for RTS games (credit @Nightwalker743)
- **Sustained Performance toggle** — requires root
- **Max Adreno Clocks toggle** — requires root
- **Winlator HUD overlay** — live performance stats, tap to toggle H/V, drag to reposition, opacity slider, text outline at low opacity
- **API Source selector** — switch between BannerHub API and EmuReady Proxy
- **Offline Steam login skip** — bypasses Steam login when offline
- **Per-variant package names** — Normal (`banner.hub`), Normal GHL (`gamehub.lite`), + 7 game-specific variants

---

## Installation

Install the APK matching your use case:
- **BannerHub-v2.7.5-Normal.apk** — standard install, package `banner.hub` (coexists with GameHub)
- **BannerHub-v2.7.5-Normal(GHL).apk** — package `gamehub.lite` (coexists with both GameHub and BannerHub Normal)
- Other variants (PuBG, Genshin, AnTuTu, etc.) use game-specific package names for simultaneous installs

All APKs are signed with AOSP testkey (v1/v2/v3). Install via ADB or any file manager that supports unknown sources.

releases.name: Bannerhub v2.7.4
releases.body: > [!WARNING] > **Only install stable releases (like this one).** Do NOT install pre-releases or raw CI artifacts — they are incomplete test builds that may crash, corrupt data, or break your Wine containers. Stable releases are the only builds that have been tested end-to-end. --- ## New since v2.7.3 (last stable) ### Wine Task Manager — Container Info + dual-tab process viewer The sidebar Task Manager has been completely rebuilt. A persistent **Container Info** panel sits at the top at all times, showing live container-specific metrics: | Row | What it shows | |-----|---------------| | **CPU Cores** | Cores assigned to the container / total device cores — reads the `WINEMU_CPU_AFFINITY` affinity bitmask from the wine child process and counts set bits (e.g. "2 / 8 total") | | **Sys RAM** | Device system RAM: used MB / total MB (from `/proc/meminfo`) | | **VRam Limit** | The VRam budget set in Game Settings → Compatibility, read directly from SharedPreferences (e.g. "1024 MB" or "Unlimited") | | **Device** | Device model name | | **Android** | Android version + API level | Below the Container Info, two tabs let you browse running processes: - **Applications** — Wine infrastructure processes (wineserver, explorer, etc.) - **Processes** — Windows `.exe` processes running under Wine - Each row shows the process name, PID, and a **Kill** button - A **↺** button manually refreshes the list; the panel also auto-refreshes every 3 seconds while open > **Credit:** Performance overlay concept and inspiration from [@StevenMXZ](https://github.com/StevenMXZ) (Winlator performance overlay). --- ### API Source selector — radio-button dialog The EmuReady toggle in Settings has been replaced with a proper **3-option radio-button dialog**. Tap the toggle to open it and choose which backend API BannerHub uses: | Option | What it does | |--------|-------------| | **BannerHub API** | Uses the self-hosted BannerHub static API (default — always works, no login required) | | **GameHub Live API** | Passes requests through to the real GameHub server (requires a valid GameHub session) | | **EmuReady API** | Uses the EmuReady community compatibility database | Your selection is saved immediately, caches are cleared, and a confirmation toast is shown. You can change it at any time without restarting. --- ## BannerHub API — Component Catalog The in-app **Component Downloader** (Component Manager → Download) pulls from the [BannerHub API](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-api). All components below are available directly inside the app — no browser or manual file transfer needed. ### DXVK (42 builds) | Build | Notes | |-------|-------| | DXVK-2.7.1-1-gplasync-arm64ec | `xna40` `xinput` `d3dcompiler_42` `d3dcompiler_43` `d3dcompiler_46` `d3dcompiler_47` `d3dx9` `d3dx11` `physx` `mediafoundation` `directplay` `directmusic` `directshow` `dsound` `dswave` `xact` `xact_x64` `oalinst` `VulkanRT` `webview2` `powershell` `powershell_core` `sqlite3` `msxml3` `msxml4` `msxml6` `K-Lite` `lavfilters702` `lavfilters741` `ffdshow` `dirac` `quicktime72` `cnc-ddraw` `cjkfonts` `winXP` `win7` `gdiplus` `vcrun6` `vbrun6` `mfc40` `mfc42` `mdac28` `jet40` `XLiveRedist` `gfw` — and more. > Full component catalog and source files: [github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-api](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-api) --- ## Full Feature Set - **My Games tab** — renamed from "My" to "My Games" for clarity - **BCI Launcher button** — top-right toolbar shortcut that opens BannersComponentInjector directly from within a game session - **Component Manager** (side menu → Components): - View all installed WCP/ZIP components in a scrollable list - Backup a component to Downloads - Inject a WCP or ZIP file from local storage - **Add New Component** — true injection via ComponentInjectorHelper - Remove an installed component - **Component Downloader** — "↓ Download from Online Repos" in the Component Manager type-selection menu: - 3-level navigation: choose a repo → choose a category (DXVK / VKD3D / Box64 / FEXCore / GPU Driver) → browse assets → download and auto-inject - Sources include Nightlies by The412Banner, Arihany WCPHub, and more - **RTS Touch Controls** — real-time strategy optimised touch input (credit [@Nightwalker743](https://github.com/Nightwalker743)) - **Offline Steam login skip** — bypasses the Steam login screen when offline so you can still launch your library - **GOG Integration** (side menu → GOG): - OAuth2 login via WebView (token stored securely in SharedPreferences) - Library sync — fetches all owned GOG games and displays them as cards - Gen 1 and Gen 2 download pipeline with progress indicator - Install confirmation dialog (shows download size + available storage before starting) - Cancel download — stops the thread and cleans up partial files - Post-install exe picker — auto-selects if one candidate; dialog if multiple - Set .exe button in game detail dialog — re-scan install dir and update at any time - Launch installed games directly from the GOG tab - Uninstall support with confirmation - ✓ Installed checkmark on game cards - **Wine Task Manager** — sidebar panel (see above) - **API Source selector** — 3-option dialog (see above) --- ## Installation > **AnTuTu note:** Two AnTuTu APK variants are provided: > - `AnTuTu` — package `com.antutu.ABenchMark` (original AnTuTu package name) > - `alt-AnTuTu` — package `com.antutu.benchmark.full` — use this if you are using the **Beacon** front end, as the original AnTuTu package name causes compatibility issues with Beacon Download the APK that matches your device architecture: | File | CPU | Notes | |------|-----|-------| | `BannerHub-Normal-arm64-v8a.apk` | ARM64 | **Most devices — use this** | | `BannerHub-Normal-armeabi-v7a.apk` | ARMv7 32-bit | Older devices | | `BannerHub-Normal-x86_64.apk` | x86_64 | Intel/AMD tablets | | `BannerHub-Normal(GHL)-*.apk` | Any | Installs as `gamehub.lite` package — coexists with the standard build | > The `Normal(GHL)` variant uses the `gamehub.lite` package name so it can be installed alongside the regular `banner.hub` build without conflict.

releases.name: Bannerhub v2.7.3
releases.body: > ⚠️ **Only install STABLE releases** (like this one). Do NOT install pre-releases or workflow artifacts — pre-releases are untested intermediate builds used for debugging, and unsigned artifacts are not properly signed for device installation. --- ## New since v2.7.2 (last stable) - **Install confirmation dialog** — before any GOG game download starts, shows the game's download size and your available storage so you can confirm before committing - **Cancel download button** — Install button turns red and becomes Cancel during an active download; pressing it stops the thread and deletes all partial files from the install directory - **Exe picker dialog (post-install)** — after install completes, if 2 or more qualifying executables are found, a dialog lets you pick the correct one (excludes redist/setup/unins/crash/helper/dotnet/vcredist/directx paths) - **Set .exe button in game detail dialog** — long-press any installed game → detail dialog now shows the current .exe filename and a **Set .exe…** button to re-pick from the install directory at any time --- ## Full Feature Set ### GOG Games (Side Menu) - OAuth2 login via WebView — token stored, auto-refreshed, survives restarts - Full library sync — Gen 1 (pre-Galaxy) and Gen 2 (Galaxy) games - **3 view modes**: List / Grid / Poster toggle - **SteamGridDB cover art** (600×900) with GOG icon fallback - **Long-press** any tile → detail dialog (description, developer, genre, current .exe, Set .exe… button) - Gen 2 download: depot manifest → per-file CDN download with live progress - Gen 1 download: byte-range resumable download - Installer fallback for very old pre-Galaxy titles (no content-system builds) - **Confirmation dialog** before download (size + available storage) - Live download progress: filename + percentage - **Cancel download** button (red during download — stops thread + deletes partial files) - **Exe picker** after install (auto-selects if only 1 candidate; dialog if 2+) - **Set .exe** button in detail dialog — re-pick the launch executable at any time - **Add** button after install → opens `EditImportedGameInfoDialog` pre-filled with exe path - Installed checkmark on cards (persistent across restarts) - Copy to Downloads folder button in detail dialog - Uninstall button in detail dialog ### Component Manager (Side Menu) - Color-coded component cards (DXVK/VKD3D/Box64/FEXCore/GPU Driver/WCP) - Live search bar - Inject WCP or ZIP to replace an existing component - Add New Component (true injection — appears in GameHub menus immediately) - Swipe right → Backup to Downloads - Swipe left → Remove (unregisters + deletes) - Remove All BannerHub-managed components (stock components untouched) - Source badge on downloaded components ### In-App Component Downloader - 3-level nav: Repo → Category → Asset list - Built-in sources: Arihany WCPHub, The412Banner Nightlies, Kimchi, StevenMXZ, and more - Checkmark on already-installed assets - One-tap download + inject with live progress ### Performance Sidebar - Sustained Performance Mode toggle - Max Adreno GPU Clocks toggle ### Other Features - **BCI Launcher button** — top-right toolbar shortcut to BannersComponentInjector - **"My Games" tab label** — renamed from "My" for clarity - **Offline Steam launch** — skips Steam login screen when offline - **Grant Root Access** button in Settings → Advanced - **RTS Touch Controls** — customizable touch input for RTS games (credit @Nightwalker743) - **Component descriptions** in Game Settings (blurb shown for each component) --- ## Installation > **AnTuTu note:** Two AnTuTu APK variants are provided: > - `AnTuTu` — package `com.antutu.ABenchMark` (original AnTuTu package name) > - `alt-AnTuTu` — package `com.antutu.benchmark.full` — use this if you are using the **Beacon** front end, as the original AnTuTu package name causes compatibility issues with Beacon | APK | Package | Use when | |-----|---------|----------| | `Normal.apk` | `banner.hub` | Fresh install / coexist with official GameHub Lite | | `Normal(GHL).apk` | `gamehub.lite` | Replace official GameHub Lite slot | | `PuBG.apk` | `com.tencent.ig` | Replace PuBG GameHub variant | | `AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.ABenchMark` | Replace AnTuTu variant | | `alt-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.benchmark.full` | Replace alt AnTuTu variant | | `PuBG-CrossFire.apk` | `com.tencent.tmgp.cf` | Replace CrossFire variant | | `Ludashi.apk` | `com.ludashi.aibench` | Replace Ludashi variant | | `Genshin.apk` | `com.mihoyo.genshinimpact` | Replace Genshin variant | | `Original.apk` | `com.xiaoji.egggame` | Replace Original variant | **If you have no GameHub variant installed:** use **Normal.apk** — it coexists with the official GameHub Lite app. All 9 variants can be installed simultaneously. All APKs are signed with AOSP testkey (v1/v2/v3).

releases.name: Bannerhub v2.7.1
releases.body:
> [!WARNING]
> **Only install stable releases (like this one). Do NOT install pre-releases or CI artifacts.**
> Pre-releases and artifacts are untested intermediate builds used for development. They may be broken, crash, or corrupt your data. Only stable releases have been verified to work correctly.

---

## New since v2.7.0 (last stable)

- **Steam card restored in My Games tab** — v2.7.0 accidentally broke the Steam login/game card by patching the APK versionName to `2.7.0`. GameHub sends versionName in its server API calls; changing it from `5.3.5` triggered a version gate that suppressed the Steam card on all fresh installs. Fixed by keeping the original `5.3.5`.
- **Normal variant is now standalone** — package renamed to `banner.hub`, no longer conflicts with or replaces official GameHub Lite
- **New Normal(GHL) variant** — package `gamehub.lite`, installs in the official GameHub Lite slot for users who want that behavior. APK: `BannerHub-vX.Y.Z-Normal(GHL).apk`

---

## Full Feature Set

### GOG Games Tab
- OAuth2 login via embedded WebView (`GogLoginActivity`)
- Auto token refresh (background thread before expiry)
- Library sync: Gen 2 (content-system depot manifest + chunked CDN download) with Gen 1 fallback (range-download from main.bin) and installer fallback (direct .exe download from api.gog.com)
- Game cards with thumbnail, Gen badge (Gen 1 / Gen 2), and install size
- Install flow: Install button → dialog → ProgressBar + per-file progress text → Add button (opens EditImportedGameInfoDialog to register with launcher)
- ✓ Installed checkmark — shown immediately on completion and persisted across restarts
- Uninstall — removes files, clears prefs, resets card
- Copy to Downloads — copies installed game folder to public Downloads directory

### Component Manager
- Side menu item → ComponentManagerActivity (ListView)
- Backup installed components (ZIP export)
- Inject WCP/ZIP components
- Add New Component (true injection via ComponentInjectorHelper)
- Remove component
- Download from Online Repos — 3-level nav: repo → category (DXVK/VKD3D/Box64/FEXCore/GPU Driver) → filtered asset list → download + inject
  - GitHub Releases API fetch (nightly-* tags)
  - Flat pack.json fetch (Arihany WCPHub)

### BCI Launcher Button
- Top-right toolbar button (`iv_bci_launcher`) opens BannersComponentInjector if installed

### My Games Tab
- Renamed from "My" to "My Games"

### Performance Sidebar
- Sustained Performance Mode toggle (setSustainedPerformanceMode — no root required)
- Max Adreno Clocks toggle (sysfs KGSL min_freq lock — requires root)

### RTS Touch Controls
- Gesture-mapped RTS touch control overlay (credit: @Nightwalker743)

### Offline Mode
- Steam login screen skipped when no network connection — attempts offline launch directly

### CI / Build
- 9 APK variants per stable release: Normal (`banner.hub`), Normal(GHL) (`gamehub.lite`), PuBG, AnTuTu, alt-AnTuTu, PuBG-CrossFire, Ludashi, Genshin, Original
- versionName preserved as `5.3.5` (original GameHub version) to maintain server API compatibility

---

## Installation
> **AnTuTu note:** Two AnTuTu APK variants are provided:
> - `AnTuTu` — package `com.antutu.ABenchMark` (original AnTuTu package name)
> - `alt-AnTuTu` — package `com.antutu.benchmark.full` — use this if you are using the **Beacon** front end, as the original AnTuTu package name causes compatibility issues with Beacon


Install the APK that matches your use case:

| APK | Package | Use when |
|-----|---------|----------|
| `BannerHub-v2.7.1-Normal.apk` | `banner.hub` | Standalone install — coexists with official GameHub Lite |
| `BannerHub-v2.7.1-Normal(GHL).apk` | `gamehub.lite` | Replaces official GameHub Lite slot |
| `BannerHub-v2.7.1-PuBG.apk` | `com.tencent.ig` | PuBG device slot |
| `BannerHub-v2.7.1-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.ABenchMark` | AnTuTu slot |
| `BannerHub-v2.7.1-Genshin.apk` | `com.mihoyo.genshinimpact` | Genshin slot |
| `BannerHub-v2.7.1-Ludashi.apk` | `com.ludashi.aibench` | Ludashi slot |
| `BannerHub-v2.7.1-Original.apk` | `com.xiaoji.egggame` | Original slot |

All APKs are signed with the same test key. You can install multiple variants simultaneously as they use different package names.

releases.name: Bannerhub v2.7.0
releases.body:
## BannerHub v2.7.0

> [!WARNING]
> **Only install APKs from stable releases (tagged `vX.Y.Z`). Do NOT install pre-release builds (tagged `vX.Y.Z-pre` or `vX.Y.Z-betaN`).**
> Pre-releases are active development snapshots — they may contain unfinished features, broken pipelines, untested code paths, or instability. Stable releases are fully tested, signed (v1/v2/v3), and verified to have passed a clean CI build with correct versionName and app labels. Never install APKs from workflow run artifacts either — those are raw unsigned CI outputs.

### New since v2.6.3 (last stable)
- **GOG Games tab** — full integration via side menu (ID=10) → GogMainActivity
  - OAuth2 login via WebView, session stored in `bh_gog_prefs` SharedPreferences
  - Auto token refresh (GET-based)
  - Two-step library sync: Gen 1 (content-system) + Gen 2 (embed.gog.com) fallback
  - Game cards with thumbnail, Gen badge, file size
  - Install flow: Install button → detail dialog → ProgressBar → per-file download progress
  - ✓ Installed checkmark (immediate + persisted on relaunch)
  - Uninstall with card reset
  - Download + Launch buttons on game card; Launch grayed until install completes
  - GOG game launch: reads install path from `bh_gog_prefs`, launches via BCI launcher
  - Copy to Downloads button in game detail dialog (recursive copy with 8KB buffer)

### Full Feature Set
- **My Games tab** renamed from "My"
- **BCI launcher button** — top-right toolbar (`iv_bci_launcher`)
- **Components side menu** — ComponentManagerActivity: backup, WCP/ZIP inject, Add New Component (true injection via ComponentInjectorHelper), Remove
- **Download Components** — ComponentDownloadActivity: 3-level nav (repo → category → asset list → download+inject); supports GitHub Releases API and Arihany WCPHub pack.json
- **RTS touch controls** — credit @Nightwalker743
- **GOG Games tab** — full OAuth2 + library sync + install + launch pipeline (see above)
- **Grant Root Access** — Settings button (contentType=0x64) to grant root permissions
- **Sustained Performance** + **Max Adreno Clocks** toggles in Performance sidebar
- **Offline Steam login skip**
- **Per-variant package names** — install alongside other GameHub variants without conflict

### Installation
> **AnTuTu note:** Two AnTuTu APK variants are provided:
> - `AnTuTu` — package `com.antutu.ABenchMark` (original AnTuTu package name)
> - `alt-AnTuTu` — package `com.antutu.benchmark.full` — use this if you are using the **Beacon** front end, as the original AnTuTu package name causes compatibility issues with Beacon

Choose the APK matching your use case:

| APK | Package | App Label |
|-----|---------|-----------|
| `BannerHub-v2.7.0-Normal.apk` | `banner.hub` | BannerHub |
| `BannerHub-v2.7.0-Normal.GHL.apk` | `gamehub.lite` | BannerHub |
| `BannerHub-v2.7.0-PuBG.apk` | `com.tencent.ig` | BannerHub PuBG |
| `BannerHub-v2.7.0-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.ABenchMark` | BannerHub AnTuTu |
| `BannerHub-v2.7.0-alt-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.benchmark.full` | BannerHub AnTuTu |
| `BannerHub-v2.7.0-PuBG-CrossFire.apk` | `com.tencent.tmgp.cf` | BannerHub PuBG CrossFire |
| `BannerHub-v2.7.0-Ludashi.apk` | `com.ludashi.aibench` | BannerHub Ludashi |
| `BannerHub-v2.7.0-Genshin.apk` | `com.mihoyo.genshinimpact` | BannerHub Genshin |
| `BannerHub-v2.7.0-Original.apk` | `com.xiaoji.egggame` | BannerHub Original |

**Which APK do I need?**
- No GameHub installed → use **Normal** (`banner.hub`) — installs alongside official GameHub Lite without conflict
- Have official GameHub Lite (`gamehub.lite`) and want BannerHub to replace it → use **Normal.GHL**
- Have a specific GameHub variant (PuBG, Genshin, etc.) → pick the matching APK

All APKs are signed with AOSP testkey (v1/v2/v3). App label and versionName are set correctly per variant.

releases.name: Bannerhub v2.6.3
releases.body: ## New since v2.6.1 (last stable) ### Component Manager — Complete UI Overhaul The Component Manager has been rebuilt from a plain ListView to a card-based RecyclerView with a polished dark UI: - **Cards** — each component shown as a compact card with a color-coded type badge (DXVK / VKD3D / Box64 / FEXCore / GPU Driver / WCP) and matching left accent strip - **Source badge** — components downloaded via BannerHub's downloader show the repo name they came from on the card (e.g. "Arihany WCPHub", "Nightlies") - **Correct type labels** — type override stored at download time ensures cards always show the right label (FEXCore, DXVK, VKD3D, etc.), even for WCP files from Arihany where the filename alone doesn't tell the type - **Live search bar** — type to filter cards in real time - **Swipe LEFT** to remove a component; **Swipe RIGHT** to back it up - **Header** with ← back button, component title, install count badge, and ✕ All button - **Bottom bar** with **+ Add New** and **↓ Download** buttons - **Empty state** — friendly placeholder shown when no components are installed - **Auto-refresh** — list updates immediately when returning from the download screen ### ✓ Downloaded Indicator In the online repo asset lists, components already installed via BannerHub are marked with ✓. The mark clears automatically when the component is removed (single remove or Remove All). ### Remove All — Correct Count The "Remove All Components" confirmation dialog now counts only BannerHub-managed components (those injected or downloaded via the Component Manager), not all GameHub system components. Remove All also only removes these managed components. ### Compact Cards Component cards are ~20% smaller — more components visible per screen. --- ## Full Feature Set ### Component Manager - Card-based RecyclerView UI with live search, swipe-to-remove/backup, source + type badges - Add New Component — inject WCP or ZIP as a new component slot - Inject file — replace an existing component's contents - Backup — copy component folder to Downloads/BannerHub/ - Remove / Remove All (BannerHub-managed only) ### In-App Component Downloader - 3-level navigation: repo → category → asset list - ✓ downloaded indicator (cleared on removal) - Download progress spinner with filename status text - 6 built-in sources: Arihany WCPHub, The412Banner Nightlies, Kimchi, StevenMXZ, MTR, Whitebelyash ### BCI Launcher Button Top-right toolbar shortcut to BannersComponentInjector ### Performance Sidebar Toggles - Sustained Performance Mode (CPU governor) - Max Adreno Clocks (GPU min=max freq lock) Both persist across launches; require root for full effect ### Grant Root Access (Settings → Advanced) 5-point warning dialog; runs `su -c id`; stores result in bh_prefs; prevents unsolicited root popup on every sidebar open ### Component Descriptions in Game Settings Picker Locally installed components show their description text in the per-game component selection menus ### RTS Touch Controls (credit: @Nightwalker743) - Tap to click, drag for box select, long press for right-click, double-tap, two-finger pan, pinch-to-zoom - Gesture settings dialog (gear icon in Controls tab) ### VRAM Limit Unlock Adds 6 GB / 8 GB / 12 GB / 16 GB options to per-game VRAM limit picker ### Per-Game CPU Core Affinity Multi-select dialog for fine-grained core assignment (Core 0–7) ### Offline Steam Launch Skips Steam login screen when autoLogin fails and no network is available ### Offline Mode for PC Game Settings Component and container lists fall back to empty data offline instead of blocking the menu ### UI Tweaks - "My" tab renamed to "My Games" --- ## Installation > **AnTuTu note:** Two AnTuTu APK variants are provided: > - `AnTuTu` — package `com.antutu.ABenchMark` (original AnTuTu package name) > - `alt-AnTuTu` — package `com.antutu.benchmark.full` — use this if you are using the **Beacon** front end, as the original AnTuTu package name causes compatibility issues with Beacon Download the APK matching your existing GameHub package: | APK | Package | |---|---| | `Bannerhub-5.3.5-Revanced-Normal.apk` | `banner.hub` (installs alongside GameHub) | | `Bannerhub-5.3.5-Revanced-PuBG.apk` | `com.tencent.ig` | | `Bannerhub-5.3.5-Revanced-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.ABenchMark` | | `Bannerhub-5.3.5-Revanced-alt-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.benchmark.full` | | `Bannerhub-5.3.5-Revanced-Ludashi.apk` | `com.ludashi.aibench` | | `Bannerhub-5.3.5-Revanced-Genshin.apk` | `com.mihoyo.genshinimpact` | | `Bannerhub-5.3.5-Revanced-Original.apk` | `com.xiaoji.egggame` | The **Normal APK** (`banner.hub`) coexists with the original GameHub — no uninstall needed. All APKs signed with AOSP testkey (v1/v2/v3).

releases.name: Winlator_Brasil_10.1, Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI e Winlator Brasil CLT
releases.body:
### 🆕 Winlator_Brasil_10.1, Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI e Winlator Brasil CLT – Novas Versões

Esta atualização traz duas versões, **Winlator Brasil 10.1**, **Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI** e **Winlator Brasil CLT**. 

**Permitindo instalar as 3 versões ao mesmo tempo, no seu celular**.

![Screenshot_2025-05-28-13-46-30-893_com miui home](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/11ae82c8-c174-425a-909d-0aa1b31db7f5)


---

O **Winlator Brasil 10.1** traz diversas melhorias e recursos adicionais para aprimorar sua experiência com jogos no Android. 

O **Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI** traz diversas melhorias e um desempenho melhor de gameplay e áudio.

O **Winlator Brasil CLT** é focado apenas em programas de trabalho do dia a dia.

--- 

Confira abaixo todas as novidades e instruções detalhadas.

---

- **NOTA:** Para utilizar o **Winlator Brasil 10.1**, você precisa desinstalar a versão original do Winlator ou Winlator Bionic ou qualquer Winlator associado ao nome do Winlator, se você já o possuía para poder instalar este mod. Ou, caso contrário, você não pode instalar este mod porque este mod é usado glibc e glibc não são suportados o nome personalizado para clonar o apk como benchmark ou qualquer outro nome.

---

### ✅ Novidades da Versão **Winlator Brasil 10.1**

- **📦 Pacote AIO Visual C++**. Instalação automática de todas as versões do Visual C++ Redistributable.
- **🌐 Novo Navegador Web**: Inclusão de um navegador leve para facilitar downloads e navegação.
- **🗜️ WinRAR**. Ferramenta de compactação/descompactação adicionada.
- **🎮 Perfis de Controles de Jogos**: Agora com 92 perfis disponíveis para download automático.

Veja como baixar os perfis de controle automaticamente:

![Download de Perfis](https://github.com/winlatorbrasil/Winlator-Brasil/blob/main/android_alsa/controle.gif )

- **📦 Instalação Offline do Wine Gecko e Mono**: Facilita a execução de aplicativos .NET e páginas com conteúdo HTML.
- **⚙️ Novas Flags do Box64**: 14 flags adicionadas para otimização e compatibilidade.
- **🌐 Novas Variáveis de Ambiente**: 17 variáveis configuráveis para ajuste fino de desempenho.
- **🇧🇷 Tradução 90% em Português (Brasil)**: Interface mais amigável para usuários brasileiros.
- **🍷 Suporte ao Wine 9.15 e 9.16 (ESTÃO EM BETA AINDA)**: Adição de menu para instalação dessas versões (Wine 10 não suportado).

`PODE ALTERNAR ENTRE AS VERSÕES DA WINE EM UM MESMO CONTAINER, SEM PRECISAR CRIAR UM NOVO CONTAINER, ISSO ESTÁ EM BETA TAMBÉM, ERROS PODEM ACONTECER.`

Aprenda a instalar as versões 9.15 e 9.16 do Wine:

![Instalação do Wine](https://github.com/winlatorbrasil/Winlator-Brasil/blob/main/android_alsa/winebug.gif )

- **🧠 Aumento da Memória Virtual**: Agora é possível configurar até 16384MB.
- **🎨 Novos Ícones nos Controles**: Facilita a edição e personalização dos controles.
- **⚡ Aumento do Limite de Taxa de Quadros**: Suporte para até 240 FPS.

---

### ✅ Novidades da Versão **Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI**

- **⚠️ ATENÇÃO AOS DRIVERS**. Ele reconhece até:
 
**Turnip:** 24.3.0
**DXVK:** 2.5.3.0
**BOX:** 0.3.3

- **⚠️ Feito com base no Fork do foxrain versão usada foi a Winlator-9.0-Amod3_LuAi.apk**.
- **📦 Pacote AIO Visual C++**. Instalação automática de todas as versões do Visual C++ Redistributable.
- **🌐 Novo Navegador Web**: Inclusão de um navegador leve para facilitar downloads e navegação.
- **🎮 Perfis de Controles de Jogos**: Agora com 92 perfis disponíveis para download automático.

Veja como baixar os perfis de controle automaticamente:

![Download de Perfis](https://github.com/winlatorbrasil/Winlator-Brasil/blob/main/android_alsa/controle.gif )

- **🗜️ WinRAR**. Ferramenta de compactação/descompactação adicionada.
- **🇧🇷 Tradução 90% em Português (Brasil)**: Interface mais amigável para usuários brasileiros.
- **📦 Instalação Offline do Wine Gecko e Mono**: Facilita a execução de aplicativos .NET e páginas com conteúdo HTML.
- **⚡ Aumento do Limite de Taxa de Quadros**: Suporte para até 240 FPS.
- **🧠 Aumento da Memória Virtual**: Agora é possível configurar até 16384MB.

---

### ✅ Novidades da Versão **Winlator Brasil CLT**

- **⚠️ Feito com base no Fork do WB64DEV versão usada foi a Winlator-9.1.1.apk**.
- **📦 Pacote AIO Visual C++**. Instalação automática de todas as versões do Visual C++ Redistributable.
- **🌐 Novo Navegador Web**: Inclusão de um navegador leve para facilitar downloads e navegação.
- **🗜️ WinRAR**. Ferramenta de compactação/descompactação adicionada.
- **🇧🇷 Tradução 90% em Português (Brasil)**: Interface mais amigável para usuários brasileiros.
- **📦 Instalação Offline do Wine Gecko e Mono**: Facilita a execução de aplicativos .NET e páginas com conteúdo HTML.
- **💻 Instalação LibreOffice**. Instalação do pacote Office Open Source, para edição de arquivos Excel, Word e PowerPoint.
- **🖌️ Instalação Blender**: Instalação do Blender para modelagens 3D.
- **⚡ Aumento do Limite de Taxa de Quadros**: Suporte para até 240 FPS.
- **🧠 Aumento da Memória Virtual**: Agora é possível configurar até 16384MB.

### ⚙️ Explicações Técnicas 

#### 🔧 Flags do Box64 

As flags do Box64 permitem ajustar o comportamento do emulador para melhor compatibilidade e desempenho:

- `BOX64_DYNAREC_SAFEFLAGS`: Ativa flags seguras no recompilador dinâmico para evitar instruções potencialmente problemáticas.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_FASTNAN`: Otimiza operações com valores NaN (Not a Number) para maior velocidade.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_FASTROUND`: Utiliza arredondamento rápido em operações de ponto flutuante.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_X87DOUBLE`: Garante precisão dupla nas operações com o coprocessador x87.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_BIGBLOCK`: Permite blocos maiores de código no recompilador dinâmico, melhorando o desempenho.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_STRONGMEM`: Implementa verificações de memória mais rigorosas para evitar acessos inválidos.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_FORWARD`: Habilita a execução antecipada de instruções para otimização.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_CALLRET`: Otimiza chamadas e retornos de funções.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_WAIT`: Garante sincronização adequada em instruções de espera.
- `BOX64_AVX`: Ativa suporte às instruções AVX para aplicações que as utilizam.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_NATIVEFLAGS`: Utiliza flags nativas do sistema host para melhor desempenho.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_WEAKBARRIER`: Reduz barreiras de memória para melhorar a velocidade, com possível impacto na precisão.
- `BOX64_MAXCPU`: Define o número máximo de CPUs virtuais disponíveis para o emulador.
- `BOX64_UNITYPLAYER`: Otimiza a execução de jogos desenvolvidos com o Unity Player.

#### 🌐 Variáveis de Ambiente 

As variáveis de ambiente permitem configurar aspectos específicos do sistema e do emulador:

- `LC_ALL`: Define a localidade padrão do sistema, afetando formatação de datas, números, etc.
- `ZINK_DESCRIPTORS`: Controla o número de descritores usados pelo driver Zink.
- `ZINK_DEBUG`: Ativa mensagens de depuração para o driver Zink.
- `MESA_SHADER_CACHE_DISABLE`: Desativa o cache de shaders no Mesa.
- `MESA_SHADER_CACHE_MAX_SIZE`: Define o tamanho máximo do cache de shaders.
- `MESA_GLTHREAD`: Ativa o threading no OpenGL para melhorar o desempenho.
- `WINEESYNC`: Habilita o esync no Wine para melhor gerenciamento de threads.
- `TU_DEBUG`: Ativa mensagens de depuração para o driver Turnip.
- `MESA_VK_WSI_DEBUG`: Ativa depuração para a interface de sistema de janelas no Vulkan.
- `MESA_GL_VERSION_OVERRIDE`: Força uma versão específica do OpenGL.
- `DXVK_HUD`: Exibe informações de desempenho na tela durante a execução.
- `GALLIUM_HUD`: Similar ao DXVK_HUD, mas para drivers Gallium.
- `PULSE_LATENCY_MSEC`: Define a latência do PulseAudio em milissegundos.
- `MESA_EXTENSION_MAX_YEAR`: Restringe as extensões do Mesa a um ano específico.
- `IR3_SHADER_DEBUG`: Ativa depuração para shaders no driver Freedreno.
- `WINE_DO_NOT_CREATE_DXGI_DEVICE_MANAGER`: Impede a criação do gerenciador de dispositivos DXGI no Wine.
- `MANGOHUD`: Ativa a sobreposição do MangoHud para monitoramento de desempenho.

---

### 📥 Instruções de Instalação

1. Instale o APK do **Winlator Brasil 10.1** normalmente no seu dispositivo Android.
2. Execute o aplicativo e aguarde a criação das pastas iniciais.
3. Acesse o menu de gerenciamento de pacotes para alternar ou baixar novas versões do Box64, Turnip ou DXVK.
4. Aplique os templates de controle nas configurações de mapeamento conforme o jogo desejado.

---

### 🛠️ Possíveis Bugs e Melhorias

⚠️ **Instabilidade com Wine 10**: Atualmente, o Wine 10 não é suportado devido a incompatibilidades conhecidas.  
📉 **Limitações de Desempenho**: Alguns dispositivos podem não atingir os 240 FPS devido a restrições de hardware.  
🌐 **Tradução Incompleta**: Apesar de 90% da interface estar traduzida para o português, algumas partes ainda podem aparecer em inglês.

`Obrigado: [afeimod](https://github.com/afeimod/) pelo seu belo trabalho em relação ao menu de drivers.`

releases.name: Winlator_Brasil_10.0
releases.body:
Esta versão do **Winlator Brasil 10.0** (fork baseado no projeto de Bruno Dev) inclui uma ampla variedade de versões do **Box64**, **Turnip**, **DXVK** e dezenas de templates de controle otimizados para jogos populares.

---

**NOTA:** Você precisa desinstalar a versão original do Winlator ou Winlator Bionic ou qualquer Winlator associado ao nome do Winlator, se você já o possuía para poder instalar este mod. Ou, caso contrário, você não pode instalar este mod porque este mod é usado glibc e glibc não são suportados o nome personalizado para clonar o apk como benchmark ou qualquer outro nome.

---

## ✅ Componentes pré-instalados

**Box64**:  
0.3.0, 0.3.2, 0.3.3, 0.3.4, 0.3.5  

**Turnip**:  
24.1.0, 25.0.0  

**DXVK**:  
0.96, 1.7.2, 1.10.3, 2.4.1  

---

## 📥 Componentes adicionais disponíveis para instalação

**Box64**:  
0.2.7, 0.2.8, 0.2.9, 0.3.1, 0.3.5.1, 0.3.5.2, 0.3.5.3, 0.3.5.5  

**Turnip**:  
23.1.0, 23.1.6, 23.3.0, 24.0.9, 24.3.0.10, 24.3.0.5,  
25.0.0.1, 25.0.0.2, 25.0.0.3, 25.0.0.4, 25.0.0.5,  
25.1.0.2, 25.2.0.1  

**DXVK**:  
0.40.1, 0.7, 0.97, 1.4.2, 1.5.5, 1.7.1, 1.10.3.0,  
1.10.6.0, 1.10.8.0, 1.13.3, 2.2, 2.2.116, 2.3.1, 2.3.1.54,  
2.4, 2.4.24, 2.4.1, 2.4.1.1, 2.4.1.123, 2.4.1.293,  
2.5.1.2, 2.5.2, 2.5.3.0, 2.6, 2.6.1.1, 2.6.2,  
78.11, 78.9, 78to11, 78to9  

---

## 🎮 Templates de controle incluídos

RTS, Template (12 buttons), Hitman 2, Virtual Gamepad, Fallout 3, Far Cry 4,  
Risen 2, Skyrim, Deus Ex: Human Revolution, Final Fantasy Type-0, Psychonauts,  
Spider-Man: Shattered Dimensions, The Alliance Alive, Mass Effect 2, Alpha Protocol,  
Dark Souls 2, Sonic Generations, Sonic Mania, The Forest, The Saboteur, Ys Origin,  
Ultima Underworld, Bioshock, Driver Parallel Lines, Divinity 2 DC, FlatOut 2,  
Rayman 3, Turok 2, Front Mission Evolved, Gravity Circuit, Metro 2033, NFSMW,  
Marvel Ultimate Alliance, Quake 4, Turok Evolution, Unepic, Untitled Goose Game,  
Infernal, Slime Rancher, SteamWorld Dig 2, IGI 2, RAGE, Oblivion, Drakensang,  
GTA 5, La Mulana, Stalker CS, Sunset Overdrive, Xanadu Next, Cyber Shadow,  
Singularity, Wolfenstein, Prey, Shovel Knight, Second Sight,  
Call of Juarez: Gunslinger, Final Fantasy 8, Star Wars Jedi Knight 2  

---

## 🆕 Changelog

- Inclusão de múltiplas versões do Box64, Turnip e DXVK (pré-instaladas e autônomas);  
- Mais de 50 templates de controle personalizados para jogos;  
- Melhor organização para facilitar atualizações e testes de compatibilidade.

---

## 📌 Instruções de instalação

1. Instale o APK do **Winlator Brasil** normalmente no seu dispositivo Android.  
2. Execute o app e aguarde a criação das pastas iniciais.  
3. Acesse a área de gerenciamento de pacotes para alternar ou baixar novas versões de Box64, Turnip ou DXVK.  
4. Aplique os templates de controle nas configurações de mapeamento conforme o jogo desejado.  

---

## 💾 Acesso ao cartão de memória

Para acessar jogos armazenados no cartão de memória, use o app **"Gerenciador de Arquivos"** (disponível gratuitamente na Play Store).  
Nele, vá até o cartão de memória, toque e mantenha pressionada uma pasta até ela ser selecionada.  
Toque em **"Mais"** (no rodapé), vá em **"Propriedades"** e veja o campo **"Pasta"**, que exibirá o caminho completo, por exemplo:  
`/storage/9BD3-F22E/`  
Copie esse caminho e cole na seção **"Drives"** do container no Winlator.

---

## 🎮 Correção de XInput

Para corrigir possíveis bugs no joystick XInput, acesse o menu:  
**Iniciar > Fixes > XInput Fixes > XInput Fix Controller**

---

⚠️ A estabilidade e o desempenho podem variar conforme o dispositivo e a GPU utilizada.
